event_description: Presence of corporate email account iaman.informant@nist.gov used for initial contact with external conspirator spy.conspirator@nist.gov.
Subject accessed secured network drive at 10.11.11.129 outside permitted hours to collect confidential data.
Subject exfiltrated collected data via personal Gmail account iaman.informant.personal@gmail.com.
Subject utilized CCleaner and Eraser to perform data destruction and conceal exfiltration activity.
Presence of IP address 10.11.11.128 associated with network activity.
